title: Malty Boil French Fish Casserole
description: A paleo-friendly, cheesy casserole with a malty twist, perfect for meal prep.

ingredients.name: Malty boil spice mix
ingredients.notes: available at most specialty stores or online

ingredients.name: All-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: almond flour or coconut flour for paleo version

ingredients.name: Whole milk
ingredients.notes: or dairy alternative for paleo version

instructions: Boil the cod fillets in salted water for 5 minutes.
Prepare the malty boil spice mix according to package instructions.
Melt the butter in a pan over medium heat.
Add the flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Slowly add in the whole milk, whisking continuously.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2 minutes, or until thickened.
Stir in the Gruyère cheese until melted and smooth.
Add the parsley, salt, and pepper to the cheese sauce and stir to combine.
Place the cooked cod fillets in the bottom of a baking dish.
Pour the cheese sauce over the cod.
Sprinkle the malty boil spice mix on top of the cheese sauce.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 5 minutes, or until golden brown.
